title: N2 traffic disrupted following major accident near Sedgefield Bridge
description: SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Motorists are advised to...
bodyText:
Breaking News

SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Motorists are advised to drive with caution near the Sedgefield Bridge on the N2 following an earlier accident that caused significant traffic delays.


> According to initial reports, four vehicles were involved in the incident, resulting in serious injuries.


No fatalities have been reported. An inquiry has been sent to the police.

This is a developing story, and more information will be published as it becomes available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
